title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif from Cursor interviews Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, covering database innovation cycles, Shopify's scaling challenges during flash sales, and the role of AI in modern engineering. The discussion examines why new database companies emerge every 15 years and what distinguishes top-tier infrastructure engineers.
